display.name: Watchfire Ruin Cache
display.short_description: A ranger watchfire lies cold beneath the pines. Warm stones still hold a trace of heat, and a split lockbox waits under the ash.

choices.label: Warm your hands
choices.summary: Hold your palms over the stubborn coals and let your breathing settle.

choices.label: Pry open the cache
choices.summary: Force the split box the rest of the way open and pocket the road coins inside.
